libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment or system-property setup. If tests cover Hoplite 3 environment-variable behavior, prefer the EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource constructor with an injected map instead of mutating process environment. If tests cover system properties, set and clear System properties in try/finally or use the SystemPropertiesPropertySource constructor with an injected map.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation examples often use YAML/HOCON/JSON, but those require separate hoplite-yaml/hoplite-hocon/hoplite-json modules and would test additional artifacts rather than being necessary for hoplite-core coverage.
The native-image run failure may still require reachability metadata updates for Hoplite 3/Kotlin 2.1 behavior; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Hoplite core is self-contained for meaningful tests: its resolved runtime dependencies are Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines, and core APIs can be exercised with MapPropertySource, PropertySource.string/InputStreamPropertySource, built-in .props parsing, decoders, preprocessors, and property-source constructors without adding format modules, Docker, or external environment setup.
